description.en: A function to recalculate an abstract class’s abstraction status. This function should be called if a class’s abstract methods have been implemented or changed after it was created. Usually, this function should be called from within a class decorator. Returns cls, to allow usage as a class decorator. If cls is not an instance of ABCMeta, does nothing. Note This function assumes that cls’s superclasses are already updated. It does not update any subclasses. Added in version 3.10.
